user_feedback: I want the monster to telegraph its attacks more, and I want the sword to swipe, right now its only rotating a bit when I press space bar, and when I dodge, I want to move a longer distance, and I want to be able to move faster and you add all of these changes
analysis:
- Issue identified: Multiple gameplay improvements needed: (1) Monster needs attack telegraph/warning animation, (2) Sword needs dramatic swipe animation instead of just rotation, (3) Dodge distance is too short, (4) Player movement speed is too slow
- Files affected: globals.js, entities.js
- Changes needed: 
  - globals.js: Increase PLAYER_SPEED, PLAYER_ACCELERATION, PLAYER_MAX_SPEED, and dodge distance multiplier
  - entities.js: Add monster attack telegraph system with visual warnings and timing, implement proper sword swipe animation with position and rotation changes, increase dodge velocity multiplier
